subcodes.first_line: The Book of Detachment hath verily been witnessed from the horizon of justice in truth, and thereby hath the standard of trustworthiness been raised amongst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الانقطاع قد کان من افق العدل بالحق مشهودا و به نصبت رایه الامانه بین
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @idolatry, @Satan; the Evil One
